notes: Affiliated Dental Specialists at One/1 E Phillip Rd Vernon Hills 60061 is genuinely part of North American Dental Group (NADG): its own site uses NADG's booking platform and nadentalgroup.com email, NADG's careers page explicitly states 'Affiliated Dental Specialists, part of the NADG team' in Vernon Hills IL, and NADG (a PE-sponsored DSO) acquired it 2021-05-19 (GDN DSO roundup, PitchBook). The branded_dso tier holds; the DB's Gryphon parent_company was simply the wrong sponsor name, not a wrong tier.

Great Lakes Dental Partners' own locations page lists Deerpath Dental Specialists at 10 W Phillip Rd Ste 117, Vernon Hills IL 60061 (exact-address match), Deerpath's own site references 'Chicagoland Smile Group' (GLDP's former name) in its careers URL, and affiliation dates to Dec 2016. GLDP is a genuine PE-backed DSO, not dentist-owned: it is a Shore Capital Partners portfolio company (raised $51.2M; Resolute Capital + Shore Capital investors; Becker's labels it 'private equity-backed DSO'), so no DOWNGRADE_T3 is warranted.

GLDP's own locator lists '4949 Euclid Ave Ste A Palatine, IL 60067' (exact match), the 2018 partnership news release confirms Meadows Dental Care (Dr. Robert Radin) joined GLDP, and independent search confirms Great Lakes Dental Partners is a Shore Capital Partners PE portfolio company (Fund I, $112.5M). File name 'Meadows Dental Group' vs locator 'Meadows Dental Care' is a benign variant at the identical address/ZIP, not a collision. Genuine branded PE-backed DSO office.

The Umbrella Dental Partners affiliation is real, not a collision: Vernon Dental Care's email domain is udentalpartners.com and 281 W Townline Rd Ste #210, Vernon Hills appears on Umbrella's own office list. However Umbrella is demonstrably dentist-owned, not PE/corporate: founders transitioned 'from a clinical mindset to a clinical and business mindset' (first acquisition 2014), listed 'privately held' with 'no funding raised yet' (LinkedIn/ZoomInfo/Tracxn), a real ~5-office IL group. So it is a dentist-owned multi-location group (T3), NOT a stealth/branded PE DSO; the stealth_dso flag is not supported at the PE-consolidation tier. Correctly left as file-untouched flag; recommend T3 group classification, not stealth_dso.

MB2 Dental's own site, its Facebook, and Becker's confirm Dr. Jessica Britten-Fazzio, owner of Palatine Dental Associates (4 S Northwest Hwy, Palatine IL 60074 — exact ZIP/owner match to the DB name JESSICA BRITTEN D.D.S. P.C.), joined MB2 Dental in July 2018. MB2 is unambiguously PE-backed (Charlesbank 2021, Warburg Pincus $525M recap Nov 2024, KKR, EV >$3.5B), so DOWNGRADE_T3 does not apply; the office keeps its local brand with no MB2 signage, correctly fitting stealth_dso (T4).

Network membership CONFIRMED: dentalstore.com's own locator lists Old Orchard Smiles at 9235 Skokie Blvd as one of 5 sister offices, and oldorchardsmiles.com/meet-the-doctors lists Dr. Richard Conen. But The Dental Store is 'family owned and operated' since 1964 by the Shulkin dentist dynasty (Dr. Glenn Shulkin, son of Dr. Neil Shulkin; Dr. Elizabeth Shulkin-Cohn DDS), with Cohn relatives in non-dentist ops roles -- no PE/corporate owner. Real multi-location network but demonstrably dentist-owned, so T3, not stealth_dso.

'Dental Store North Shore is now Old Orchard Smiles' confirmed at 9235 Skokie Blvd via the network's own locator and dentalstorenorthshore.com. However the controller is a dentist family, not a DSO/PE: 'family owned and operated' since 1964, Shulkin dentist family (Dr. Glenn Shulkin son of Dr. Neil Shulkin, Dr. Elizabeth Shulkin-Cohn DDS); Joel Cohn (COO) and Barry Cohn (office manager) are non-dentist family members handling operations, no outside capital. The classifier itself found 'no PE sponsor... family-run multi-location management company.' Dentist-owned multi-location group = T3.

Cross-brand 'Old Orchard Smiles / Toni Ellis Wolf, DDS PC' confirmed via Yelp/BBB (Dr. Wolf's practice absorbed into Old Orchard Smiles at 9235 Skokie Blvd; she was reportedly retiring 2021) and the network is real per dentalstore.com's locator. But same ownership finding applies: The Dental Store is a family/dentist-owned group (Shulkin dynasty since 1964), no PE sponsor or national DSO brand. Real dentist-owned multi-location network -> DOWNGRADE_T3, not stealth_dso.

The practice's own website (choosemoderndentistry.com) lists the exact unit address 1431 McHenry Rd Ste 108, Buffalo Grove IL 60089, identifies the legal entity as 'Dental Health Professionals of Illinois, P.C.', operates as 'Modern Dentistry,' and states it is part of the Orahh Care Dental Community; both that site and orahhcare.com confirm Orahh Care is 'a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC, a dental support organization.' A K A DENTAL's org NPI 1598937377 is registered at 4445 N Pulaski Rd, 60630 — verbatim one of the 7 clinics on udclinics.com ('N. Pulaski: 4445 North Pulaski Road Chicago, IL 60630'), so the address-to-brand link is exact, not a name collision. Address->brand mapping is genuine: Precision Dental Care's locator lists 'N Pulaski - 4830 N. Webster Dental Care's own locator lists the Edison Park office at 7760 W Devon Ave, Chicago IL 60631 as one of 8 branded Chicagoland offices, and the brand runs a corporate management layer ('Webster Dental Management') with a non-dentist CEO plus explicit acquisition/consolidator behavior — a genuine branded regional DSO. Dental Dreams' own locator brands 'Studio Dental' (4310 S Pulaski) as their office; Healthgrades names Dr. Melisa Tillner's practice 'Studio Dental LLC'; the (773) 254-3300 phone is independently confirmed shared across both the 4410 (Tillner) and 4310 (Studio Dental) listings, which multiple directories describe as one operation. Brand's own locator page places the exact address 5160 S Pulaski Ste. 102, Chicago, IL 60632 under 'All Family Dental & Braces' (multi-provider clinic; Dr. Pujan Patel DMD is one of several associate dentists, not owner). Independently verified: WebMD confirms exact address+phone (6153 S Western Ave / (773) 863-0129) branded DENTALWORKS, corroborated by Yelp (updated Jan 2026), denteldoc, yellowpages, dentistoffices, birdeye. sonrava.com/brands lists DentalWorks as a Sonrava Health brand; Sonrava is PE-backed by New Mountain Capital. Affordable Care's own national locator lists this exact address (2700 N Narragansett Ave Suite F-3, Chicago, IL 60639) as the Affordable Dentures & Implants Oak Park office, corroborated independently by Yelp and a company blog opening announcement; no name collision. Brand tie is real: independent sources (Yelp, patientconnect365) place 4801 W Peterson Ave, Chicago 60646 under 'Webster Dental Care of Sauganash,' so this is a genuine multi-location branded network. Dental 360's own locator page lists 3855 W North Ave, Chicago IL 60647-4640, (773) 782-8900 exactly as its 'North Ave' office; independent sources (Yelp/Waze/Practo/Healthgrades/CareCredit) confirm this address operates as Dental 360 / North Avenue Family Dentist, and Dental 360 is a 16+ IL-office multi-state branded chain. A real multi-location network exists, but documentary evidence contradicts the stealth-DSO (non-dentist controller) premise: federal opinion In re Dental Profile Inc. and Dentist, 446 B.R. 885 (Bankr. N.D. Ill. 2011) names licensed IL dentist Dr. Husam Aldairi as president/sole shareholder who 'owns and operates various dental clinics in Chicago and its surrounding suburbs' through multiple corporate entities. Milan Roncevic's NPI role is 'General Manager'/authorized official (an administrative title; AO status is not beneficial ownership), and his LinkedIn/ZoomInfo 'CEO' titles do not establish lay control. So this is a dentist-owned multi-location group, not a lay-controlled stealth DSO. Caveat: court record is 2011-vintage; current ownership not independently documented, but IL P.C. law requires dentist ownership and no sale to a lay/known-DSO entity was found.

Dental 360's own locations page lists 'Logan Square: 2314 N. Milwaukee Ave Suite B' with phone (773) 697-3164, an exact address + phone match to Brite Dental at this address. Dental 360 is a genuine 20+ office branded network (IL/WI/IN); no evidence it is dentist-owned, so branded_dso stands.

Yelp shows 'Dental Magic - CLOSED' at 2500 W North Ave; Dental 360's locations page lists 'Bucktown: 2500 W North Ave, (773) 360-1281' with the identical phone (773-360-1281) carried over from the legacy Dental Magic listing — a clear brand takeover of the same physical address.

ProSmile's own release confirms TriSpan-backed ProSmile completed its Destiny Dental acquisition in Aug 2024, so it is not dentist-owned — branded_dso is correct.

CMS NPPES registry confirms NPI 1962793943 (org NPI, 'MOBILE DENTAL CARE OF ILLINOIS PC', 3716 217th St, Matteson IL 60443) has authorized official Frank Charles Camarda Jr., title 'Manager', prefix 'Mr.' (no DDS) -- the same non-dentist businessman the WI OCI exam report names as President/CEO and 18.75% trust-owner of the Camarda+Sawicz SeniorDent/SenovaCare family enterprise, which delivers dentistry via contracted dentist PCs (friendly-PC structure). This is a non-dentist-controlled multi-location mobile-dental group (corroborated by RocketReach, ZoomInfo srdent.com, and a sibling entity 'National Mobile Dental Care Inc' in Camarda's Tinley Park), matching stealth_dso; it is demonstrably NOT dentist-owned (so not DOWNGRADE_T3) and not a name collision. Minor caveat: OCI holding chart doesn't literally list this exact PC under SenovaCare, but Camarda's control is federally verified; no PE evidence, consistent with the claim.

The brand's own locator confirms 15800 S Harlem Ave, Orland Park IL 60462 is an Affordable Dentures & Implants branded office (friendly-PC footer: 'licensed trade name of Affordable Dentures & Implants - Orland Park III, P.C.'). Affordable Care is a national PE-backed DSO (Berkshire 2015, then Harvest Partners/PSP Investments 2021, ~$2.7B EV), so branded_dso is correct; the classifier's 'IV' vs the live 'III' PC numbering is a trivial same-address entity variance, not a refutation.

Address 13303-A S Ridgeland Ave (phone 708-371-8400) is genuinely on American Dental's atooth.com corporate locator and matches the multi-dentist Mehta/Alia/Abdeddin/Taneva group, so the branded multi-location network is real and correctly identified. However the entity is 'American Dental Associates LTD' — a dentist-owned Illinois professional corporation (est. 1996) led by owner-dentist Dr. Dhiraj Sharma (email drsharma@atooth.com, family in-house General Counsel Sagar Sharma), with zero evidence of PE backing, an MSO/management company, or a corporate parent. It is a dentist-owned group practice, not a DSO consolidation target — hence downgrade to T3, not branded_dso.

Aspen Dental's own locator page confirms 15894 S LaGrange Rd, Orland Park, IL 60467 (ZIP matches) as an active branded office (hours, phone 708-737-5325), corroborated by Yelp/Birdeye. Aspen Dental is a well-documented national branded DSO majority-owned (~80%) by PE firms Leonard Green & Partners and Ares Management; the cited press release says 'increase equity ownership' (a 2017 recap) but independent search confirms the PE majority control, so branded_dso stands with no name collision or address mismatch.

Dental Dreams' own locator (both cited URLs, live) lists this exact office at 2254 S Cicero Ave, Cicero IL 60804, phone (708) 656-2222; independent directories (Practo, denTEL, CareCredit, Yahoo) place 'Dental Experts LLC'/'Dental Experts Cicero LLC' at the identical street/phone, and ZoomInfo/BBB tie 'Dental Experts, LLC' to Dental Dreams, a genuine ~74-location multi-state DSO. Address, ZIP, and phone match exactly (record's 706 area code is a one-digit typo of 708); no name collision, no dentist-owned-group downgrade warranted.

The cited locator page genuinely places 2803 W 95th St, Evergreen Park 60805 under the Family Dental Care brand (a real 8-office Chicago Southland/NW Indiana network), and the EIN 363554595 cluster is confirmed across 60453/60617/60805 — so the network is real, but it is demonstrably DENTIST-owned, not a DSO/PE platform. The brand's own site footer reads '(c)2026 Dr. Alexander G. Alemis and Family Dental Care', independent sources describe it as 'the largest privately owned dental group in Chicago' founded by Dr. Alemis in 1986 with no parent company/DSO/PE, and a sibling location at the same EIN (Oak Lawn Dental Care) is already internally flagged ownership_tier 'dentist_multi'. 'branded_dso' overstates it; correct tier is a dentist-owned multi-location group (T3).

All four cited URLs verify: BBB confirms 366 W Army Trail Rd #310A / (630) 686-1328 operated as 'DentalWorks in Bloomingdale' since ~2009, and sonrava.com/brands confirms DentalWorks is a Sonrava Health brand (PE-backed). The current storefront 'Dentist in Bloomingdale' sits at the identical suite+phone, hides all dentist names, inherited DentalWorks' patients, and independently displays ADSO ('Association of Dental Support Organizations') and 'Women in DSO' membership badges on its own site -- refuting the 'independent solo took over' alternative and corroborating a DSO de-brand. Caveat: DentalWorks' own listings for this address are now dead (subdomain does not resolve; /offices/illinois/bloomingdale/ 404s; Yelp flags DentalWorks 'MOVED'), so I cannot 100% exclude that a different DSO now operates it -- but it remains a corporate/DSO location, not independent, so the branded_dso tier holds.
